attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Mental Crush
attacks.text: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Rumble Stomp
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

ability.name: Ignition
ability.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may take a {R} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your Active {R} Pokémon.

attacks.name: Raging Blaze
attacks.text: If this Pokémon’s remaining HP is 110 or less, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon’s Overdrive Smash attack does +30 damage.

attacks.name: Thundering Volcano
attacks.text: If Electivire is on your Bench, this attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Laundry-Go-Round
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack also does 20 damage for each heads to each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Raging Freeze
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent’s last turn, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Water Splash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Emperor’s Strike
attacks.text: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon has more remaining HP than this Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Aqua Turbo
attacks.text: Take a {W} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched {W} Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Incendiary Thunder
attacks.text: If Magmortar is on your Bench, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Lightning Accelerator
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each point you have gotten.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Miraculous Memory
attacks.text: 1 attack from among the Pokémon in your opponent’s hand and deck is chosen at random, and you use the chosen attack as this attack.

attacks.name: Swaying Dance
attacks.text: If your opponent has exactly 2, 4, or 6 cards in their hand, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Gaia Blast
attacks.text: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Labyrinth of Shadows
attacks.text: During your opponent’s next turn, they can’t play any Trainer cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Dark Slumber
attacks.text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

ability.name: Bad Dreams
ability.text: At the end of each turn, if your opponent’s Active Pokémon is Asleep, do 20 damage to that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Energy Crush
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Energy attached to all of your opponent’s Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energizer Wheel
attacks.text: Move 2 {D} Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Enormous Explosion
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 100 damage to itself and 50 damage to all Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s).

attacks.name: Bullet Slugger
attacks.text: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

ability.name: Metal Transport
ability.text: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active {M} Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tail Strike
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Sky’s Blessing
attacks.text: Take a {W} and a {L} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach them to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragon Wave
attacks.text: Discard a {W} and a {L} Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Frenzied Blade
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s).

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.text: During your opponent’s next turn, the Defending Pokémon can’t retreat.

attacks.name: Rout
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spinning Draw
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Quick Blow
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

ability.name: Fur Coat
ability.text: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

name: Nasty Notice
text: Your opponent discards cards from their hand until they have 4 cards in their hand.

name: Maintenance
text: Shuffle 2 cards from your hand into your deck. Draw a card. If you can’t shuffle in 2 cards, you can’t use this card.

name: Iris
text: During this turn, if your opponent’s Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your Haxorus, you get 1 more point.

name: Calem
text: Draw a card for each Mega Evolution Pokémon ex in play (both yours and your opponent’s).

name: Hiking Trail
text: At the end of each player’s turn, that player draws cards until they have 3 cards in their hand.

ability.text: Once during your turn, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon ex that has any Energy attached. If you do, discard a random Energy from that Pokémon.

name: Metal Core Barrier
text: If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your opponent’s turn.  The {M} Pokémon this card is attached to takes −50 damage from attacks from your opponent’s Pokémon.
